title: eupatorium squalidum var. typicum
intro: Eupatorium squalidum var. typicum, also known as Chinese Eupatorium or Small White Thoroughwort, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, native to China and Southeast Asia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, triterpenoids, and other bioactive compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eupatorium squalidum var. typicum include its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antiviral properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, headache, and respiratory tract infections. Eupatorium squalidum var. typicum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
